gameTitle: Phantasy Star IV: The End of the Millennium

achievements.title: Hahn
achievements.description: Recruit Hahn.
achievements.notes: Hahn joins in the Academy basement entrance after paying 100 MST

achievements.title: Academy Infestation
achievements.description: Solve the monster situation in the academy's basement.
achievements.notes: First dungeon: Academy basement cleared by defeating Igglanova

achievements.title: Rune
achievements.description: Recruit Rune.
achievements.notes: Rune joins in the ruins of Molcum

achievements.title: Gryz
achievements.description: Recruit Gryz.
achievements.notes: Gryz joins at Grandfather Dorin's hut in Tonoe

achievements.title: Petrified People
achievements.description: Save the people of Zema.
achievements.notes: Zema residents restored from stone using Alshline

achievements.title: Rika
achievements.description: Recruit Rika.
achievements.notes: Rika joins outside the destroyed Bio-Plant

achievements.title: A Doomed Vessel
achievements.description: Inspect the computer system in Wreckage.
achievements.notes: Wreckage entered from overworld between Aiedo and Nalya

achievements.title: HG: The Ranch Owner
achievements.description: Complete 'The Ranch Owner' in the Hunter's Guild. (Missed upon finding Elsydeon.)
achievements.notes: Sand Worm boss fight at Mile ranch. Available after reaching Hunter's Guild. Withdrawn upon finding Elsydeon.

achievements.title: Zealous Village
achievements.description: Reach the town of Kadary.
achievements.notes: Kadary reached through Vahal Fort

achievements.title: Demi
achievements.description: Recruit Demi.
achievements.notes: Demi joins at the Machine Centre after being freed from Zio's Fort

achievements.title: This Luster! This Massiveness!
achievements.description: Discover the Land Rover.
achievements.notes: Land Rover obtained from the Machine Centre

achievements.title: HG: Tinkerbell's Dog
achievements.description: Complete 'Tinkerbell's Dog' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: Requires Land Rover. Buy shortcake in Naura and find Rocky in Krup, Monsen, or Termi

achievements.title: Initiate: Phononmezer
achievements.description: Recover the Phononmezer parts in Plate System.
achievements.notes: Demi acquires PHONON skill from weapon units in Plate System

achievements.title: Tectonic Tech
achievements.description: Solve Plate System's earthquake malfunction. (Missed upon leaving Motavia.)
achievements.notes: Plate System controls shut down by Demi. Missable after shuttle to Zelan in 6.2.12

achievements.title: Rune's Reunion
achievements.description: Find Rune again.
achievements.notes: Rune rejoins the party at Ladea Tower

achievements.title: Psychic Nullification
achievements.description: Recover the Psycho Wand.
achievements.notes: Psycho Wand obtained at the top of Ladea Tower after defeating Gy-Laguiah

achievements.title: The Dark Sorcerer
achievements.description: Defeat Zio.
achievements.notes: Zio defeated at Nurvus after Rune cancels MAG.BARRIR

achievements.title: HG: The Missing Student
achievements.description: Complete 'The Missing Student' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: After shutting down Nurvus. Buy Perolymate in Termi, find student in Kadary church

achievements.title: HG: Fissure of Fear
achievements.description: Complete 'Fissure of Fear' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: After shutting down Nurvus. Rescue Tallas from Fract Ooze in Monsen fissure

achievements.title: Wren
achievements.description: Recruit Wren.
achievements.notes: Wren joins on Zelan

achievements.title: Raja
achievements.description: Recruit Raja.
achievements.notes: Raja joins at his temple after visiting Meese

achievements.title: Space Sledding
achievements.description: Discover the Landale.
achievements.notes: Landale spaceship found underground in Tyler

achievements.title: Initiate: Hyper-Jammer
achievements.description: Recover the Hyper-Jammer parts in Kuran.
achievements.notes: Wren acquires HIJAMMER skill from Hyper-Jammer unit in Kuran

achievements.title: Dark Satellite
achievements.description: Resolve Kuran's communications problem.
achievements.notes: After defeating Dark Force on Kuran, Wren restores communications

achievements.title: Glacier Grinder
achievements.description: Use the Ice Digger for the first time.
achievements.notes: Ice Digger obtained and used on Dezolis

achievements.title: Musk Cat, Tusk Cat
achievements.description: Receive the Silver Tusk.
achievements.notes: Silver Tusk given by the chief of the musk cats in Mysterious Valley

achievements.title: Weather Watch
achievements.description: Investigate Climate Control for any weather malfunctions. (Missed upon the snowstorm ending.)
achievements.notes: Climate Control Centre dungeon. Unavailable after Dark Force 2 defeated in Garuberk Tower (6.4.9)

achievements.title: I Guess... I'm Out Cold! Ha ha!
achievements.description: Investigate the town of Meese.
achievements.notes: Meese visited after Climate Control; Raja collapses from Black Energy Wave sickness

achievements.title: Kyra
achievements.description: Recruit Kyra.
achievements.notes: Kyra joins after being rescued and hearing the truth about Lutz

achievements.title: The Millennium Man
achievements.description: Meet Lutz.
achievements.notes: Rune reveals he is the fifth-generation Lutz in the Esper Mansion

achievements.title: Initiate: Burst Rockets
achievements.description: Recover the Burst Roc parts in Weapons Plant.
achievements.notes: Wren acquires BURSTROC skill from Burst Roc unit in Weapons Plant

achievements.title: Dezolian Flame
achievements.description: Retrieve the Eclipse Torch.
achievements.notes: Eclipse Torch retrieved from Lashiec in Air Castle catacombs

achievements.title: Purified Planet
achievements.description: Dispel the evil of Garuberk Tower.
achievements.notes: Dark Force 2 defeated at top of Garuberk Tower; the tower shatters

achievements.title: Hyper Hovercraft
achievements.description: Use the HydroFoil for the first time.
achievements.notes: Hydrofoil unveiled by Demi at Motavia Spaceport

achievements.title: HG: The Stain in Life
achievements.description: Complete 'The Stain in Life' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: Requires Hydrofoil and 50000 MST. Find the chief's two daughters from Uzo village

achievements.title: HG: The Dying Boy
achievements.description: Complete 'The Dying Boy' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: Requires Hydrofoil. Buy Alis-word in Termi, visit sick boy in Torinco

achievements.title: HG: Man with a Twist
achievements.description: Complete 'Man with a Twist' in the Hunter's Guild.
achievements.notes: Requires Hydrofoil. Defeat King Rappy on Torinco island

achievements.title: HG: Silver Soldier
achievements.description: Complete 'Silver Soldier' in the Hunter's Guild. (Missed upon finding Elsydeon.)
achievements.notes: Requires Hydrofoil. Defeat 3 Dominators in Vahal Fort. Withdrawn after obtaining Elsydeon

achievements.title: Initiate: Positron Bolt
achievements.description: Recover the Positron Bolt parts in Vahal Fort. (Missed upon finding Elsydeon.)
achievements.notes: Wren acquires POSIBOLT skill. Must complete Silver Soldier HG job before Elsydeon (6.5.7)

achievements.title: Seth
achievements.description: Recruit Seth.
achievements.notes: Seth joins at Soldier's Temple entrance, later revealed as Dark Force in disguise

achievements.title: A Path to the Stars
achievements.description: Recover the Aero-Prism and escape the Soldier's Temple.
achievements.notes: Aero-Prism acquired at Soldier's Temple, then escape after defeating Dark Force 3

achievements.title: Towering Silence
achievements.description: Investigate the Tower of Silence.
achievements.notes: Silence Temple on Rykros serves as the hub upon landing

achievements.title: Towering Strength
achievements.description: Prove yourself in the Tower of Strength.
achievements.notes: De-Vars defeated in Tower of Strength on Rykros

achievements.title: Towering Courage
achievements.description: Prove yourself in the Tower of Courage.
achievements.notes: Sa-Lews defeated in Tower of Courage on Rykros

achievements.title: A Hero's Sword
achievements.description: Find Elsydeon.
achievements.notes: Chaz obtains Elsydeon from the statue in hidden chamber beneath Esper Mansion

achievements.title: Towering Anger
achievements.description: Prove yourself in the Tower of Anger.
achievements.notes: Le Roof reveals Algo's genesis in Tower of Anger after Strength and Courage towers

achievements.title: The End of the Millennium
achievements.description: Defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Profound Darkness defeated in the final battle at The Edge

achievements.title: Profound Courage
achievements.description: Take Hahn and defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Must include Hahn in the party for the final battle

achievements.title: Profound Strength
achievements.description: Take Gryz and defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Must include Gryz in the party for the final battle

achievements.title: Profound Will
achievements.description: Take Demi and defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Must include Demi in the party for the final battle

achievements.title: Profound Wit
achievements.description: Take Raja and defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Must include Raja in the party for the final battle

achievements.title: Profound Spirit
achievements.description: Take Kyra and defeat the Profound Darkness.
achievements.notes: Must include Kyra in the party for the final battle

achievements.title: Four Bells, Four Torches
achievements.description: Defeat the Profound Darkness with only the main 4 characters. (Missed if anyone else is taken.)
achievements.notes: Must take only Chaz, Rika, Wren, and Rune to the final battle
achievements.missableCutoff: Entering The Edge with a 5th party member

achievements.title: Encore!
achievements.description: Access the hidden Sound Test.
achievements.notes: After completing the game, press B on Title Menu to access Sound Test

achievements.title: Welcome To The Phantasy Zone
achievements.description: Opa! Opa!
achievements.notes: Watch the dance in the Hunters Guild theatre in Aiedo

communityTips.text: For this achievement, you must see the dancers dance in Aiedo.

achievements.title: A Memento of our Trip
achievements.description: Place a particular triangular flag in your house and admire it.
achievements.notes: Buy PENNANT from Termi gift shop, use in Alys' house in Aiedo

achievements.title: The Romance of Travel
achievements.description: Place a particular wood doll in your house and admire it.
achievements.notes: Buy WOODCARVIN from Termi gift shop, use in Alys' house in Aiedo

achievements.title: Algo Legend
achievements.description: Inspect the Alis Landale statue.
achievements.notes: Termi is the hometown of Alis Landale and contains her statue

communityTips.text: Cool statue, Rocky probably marked it as his property before he ran off again

achievements.title: Pengo Land
achievements.description: Take a walk with a penguin.
achievements.notes: Pay 500 MST to Penguin Man in Zosa to rent a Dezolis Penguin

achievements.title: Penguin Power
achievements.description: Summon a penguin.
achievements.notes: Buy PENGU-FEED from Zosa Tool Store; using it cures Poison and shows a penguin

achievements.title: A Library for the AGES
achievements.description: Read 3 certain books in a school.
achievements.notes: Read 3 books in the Krup classroom (Hahn hometown, Section 6.1.6)

communityTips.text: Its in Krup. The 3 books reference Sega games.
Each book cabinet has two books: left and right side

achievements.title: Beyond the Sand Sea
achievements.description: Defeat a wild Sand Worm in east Motavia.
achievements.notes: Wild Sand Worms appear on foot near Monsen, Termi, and Uzo in east Motavia

achievements.title: Kuran's Charge Cannon
achievements.description: Defeat C-Ray Tube + Sat. Minions in Kuran.
achievements.notes: C-Ray Tube and Sat.Minion enemies are both encountered in Kuran

achievements.title: Alt-Transform-Delete
achievements.description: Defeat a Lifedeletr that combines from Wiredine + Arthropod in Weapons Plant.
achievements.notes: Allow Arthropod+Wiredine to COMBINE into LifeDeletr, then defeat it

achievements.title: Fused Shadows
achievements.description: Defeat a Twinarms that fuses from Bladeright + Hakenleft in the Rykros towers.
achievements.notes: Bladeright+Hakenleft in Strength/Courage Towers fuse into Twinarms

achievements.title: Falz into Darkness
achievements.description: Defeat a rare enemy at The Edge.
achievements.notes: Defeat a Prophallus, the dreaded rare Darkspawn on lower levels of The Edge

communityTips.text: PROPHALLUS mob that looks exactly like the one on the cheevo picture. Found him on the 7th floor (the floor before the final boss floor).

achievements.title: The Cursed Blade
achievements.description: Equip Chaz with a rare sword from a Shadow Saber.
achievements.notes: SHADWBLADE drops from ShadowSabr in Zio's Fort and Ladea Tower

communityTips.text: This drops only in Zios Fort from Shadow Sabre. So I beat zio and the fort collapsed. No change to farm it after that. So this should be marked missable.
I was wrong here. Lades tower also has the enemies do not missable.

achievements.title: Victory Through Defeat
achievements.description: Equip Gryz with a rare axe from a Chaos Bringer.
achievements.notes: DEFEAT-AXE rare drop from ChaosBrngr in The Edge

achievements.title: Our Powers, Combined!
achievements.description: Execute any Combo.
achievements.notes: First-time combo execution. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Elemental Weaknesses
achievements.description: Execute Combo: Blizzard on Motavia, or Fire Storm on Dezolis.
achievements.notes: Blizzard (WAT+ZAN) or Fire Storm (FOI+ZAN) requires Rune who joins in this section. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Sudden Death
achievements.description: Execute any instant-death Combo.
achievements.notes: Options: Holocaust (Hahn+Rune), Lethal Img (Alys+Rika). All characters available by this section. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Triple Threat
achievements.description: Execute Combo: TriBlaster.
achievements.notes: Requires FOI + TSU + WAT (Triblaster). Party of Chaz+Alys+Hahn available from first battle. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Ultimate Destruction
achievements.description: Execute Combo: Destruct.
achievements.notes: Requires DEBAN > MEGID+LEGEON+POSIBOLT (Destruct). Wren joins in this section. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Just As Planned!
achievements.description: Execute a Combo in a Macro.
achievements.notes: Set up a Macro with correct sequence of Techs/Skills. First macro setup in walkthrough is at Nurvus. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Combo Strategist
achievements.description: Execute 3 different Combos in a single battle, and win.
achievements.notes: Execute 3 different Combos in a single battle. Full party of 5 available after Wren joins. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Macro Strategist
achievements.description: Execute 4 different Macros in a single battle, and win.
achievements.notes: Set up 4 different Macros before battle and execute each. This achievement can be earned over the course of the playthrough — it is not necessary or beneficial to grind for it at this point.

achievements.title: Inventory, Attack!
achievements.description: Use a non-consumable item in battle to affect your enemies, except Psycho Wand.
achievements.notes: Use any weapon or equipment with offensive battle effect

achievements.title: Inventory, Assist!
achievements.description: Use a non-consumable item in battle to support your allies.
achievements.notes: Use any weapon or equipment with supportive battle effect

achievements.title: Limit: Mile Sand Worm
achievements.description: Defeat the Sand Worm in 'The Ranch Owner' before finding Demi. Combined level limit: 35, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Must defeat Sand Worm before Demi joins (6.2.10). Combined party level ≤ 35

achievements.title: Limit: Juza
achievements.description: Defeat Juza. Combined level limit: 45, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Fought in Zio's Fort (Castle in the Sands). Combined party level ≤ 45

achievements.title: Limit: Gy-Laguiah
achievements.description: Defeat the Gy-Laguiah in Ladea Tower. Combined level limit: 65, party of 5.
achievements.notes: First Gy-Laguiah fight in Ladea Tower. Combined party level ≤ 65

achievements.title: Limit: Zio
achievements.description: Defeat Zio. Combined level limit: 75, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Winnable Zio fight in Nurvus. Use PSYCO-WAND. Combined party level ≤ 75

achievements.title: Limit: Fissure Fract Ooze
achievements.description: Defeat the Fract Ooze in 'Fissure of Fear' before finding Wren. Combined level limit: 55, party of 3.
achievements.notes: Must complete before Wren joins (6.2.13). Only Chaz, Rika, Rune. Combined level ≤ 55

achievements.title: Limit: Dark Force I
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Force I. Combined level limit: 113, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Fought in Garuberk Tower on Kuran. Combined party level ≤ 113

achievements.title: Limit: Carnivorous Trees
achievements.description: Defeat 50 Carnivorous Trees without Raja or Kyra. Combined level limit: 95, party of 4.
achievements.notes: Grind 50 Carnivorous Tree enemies near Garuberk Tower. No Raja or Kyra

achievements.title: Limit: Xe-A-Thouls
achievements.description: Defeat the Xe-A-Thouls in Air Castle. Combined level limit: 125, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Fight 3 Xe-A-Thouls simultaneously in Air Castle. Combined party level ≤ 125

achievements.title: Limit: Lashiec
achievements.description: Defeat Lashiec. Combined level limit: 133, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Fought in Air Castle Basement. Combined party level ≤ 133

achievements.title: Limit: Dark Force II
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Force II. Combined level limit: 140, party of 5.
achievements.notes: Fought in the organic Living Tower on Dezolis. Combined party level ≤ 140

achievements.title: Limit: King Rappy
achievements.description: Defeat King Rappy in 'Man with a Twist' with no 5th party member. Combined level limit: 110, party of 4.
achievements.notes: Must defeat King Rappy with only 4 party members. Combined level ≤ 110

achievements.title: Limit: Dark Force III
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Force III. Combined level limit: 115, party of 4.
achievements.notes: Fought at Soldier's Temple. Seth reveals himself as Dark Force. Combined level ≤ 115

achievements.title: Limit: De-Vars
achievements.description: Defeat De-Vars. Combined level limit: 125, party of 4.
achievements.notes: Guardian of Strength Tower on Rykros. Combined party level ≤ 125

achievements.title: Limit: Sa-Lews
achievements.description: Defeat Sa-Lews. Combined level limit: 125, party of 4.
achievements.notes: Guardian of Courage Tower on Rykros. Combined party level ≤ 125

achievements.title: Limit: Profound Darkness
achievements.description: Defeat the Profound Darkness. Combined level limit: 170 with a party of 5, or 155 with a party of 4.
achievements.notes: Final boss. Combined level limits vary by party size: 170 (5) or 155 (4)
